name: S-16 --apply-to-rules does not auto-demote a rule whose history records operator-explicit state per the architecture
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch tree/g && printf '2026-05-20T00:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/g.txt && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, rule_state: block, rule_state_history: [{reason: operator-explicit}], provenance: [{class: published-standard, source: g}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --apply-to-rules --tree tree --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>err.txt && ! grep -q 'auto-demoted r' err.txt && echo preserved 1>&2
